source_refs: Google official Gemini image generation docs - model capability and product positioning
External methodology: The JSON Prompting Playbook (pattern summary only, not verbatim transcription)
External methodology: 20 Nano Banana 2 Prompts You Need to Start Using Immediately (pattern summary only, not verbatim transcription)
Project evidence: repo candidate review and promotion workflow
business_goal: Build trust in Rally Technology's industrial automation and control-integration capability
visual_message: A real, modern, commercially usable industrial control environment for a B2B technology website

reference_roles.image_2: optional material and industrial credibility reference

iteration_hypothesis: Using stronger realism anchors plus a right-side empty safe area will reduce AI-looking artifacts and improve homepage usability

technical_signals.aperture: f/2.8 to f/4 for realistic depth without over-blur
technical_signals.light_source: soft premium interior light with controlled screen glow
technical_signals.time_of_day: late afternoon or controlled interior daylight-neutral mood
technical_signals.motion_rule: mostly still scene; no dramatic motion blur unless intentionally testing atmosphere

spatial_positioning: monitoring wall sits in the left-center visual field
right side remains open as clean negative space
operator appears only as a secondary scale cue
glass partition can sit in the foreground to create depth
visual_standard: architectural interior photography with corporate photography discipline
color_restriction: restrained industrial neutrals, charcoal, matte grey, muted steel, controlled screen greens or cyans only; avoid purple-blue neon wash
reality_anchor: matte metal and composite console surfaces

composition_rule.hero_safe_area: right side reserved as empty safe area for later headline and CTA overlay
composition_rule.focal_structure: one main focal point, one depth layer, no clutter
composition_rule.camera: architectural interior photography, eye-level or slightly elevated

lighting_rule.surface_behavior: clean reflections, no plastic AI sheen

disallowed_ai_signals: too many office chairs as focus
